adversarygraph.product_name.scope: Canonical public name of the flagship self-hosted CTI-to-detection platform.

adversarygraph.stable_release.scope: Latest non-draft, non-prerelease AdversaryGraph GitHub release, without the tag prefix.

adversarygraph.latest_release_tag.scope: Latest immutable AdversaryGraph GitHub release tag.

adversarygraph.release_published_at.scope: GitHub publication timestamp for the v6.0.0 release.

adversarygraph.release_commit.scope: Git commit resolved by the immutable v6.0.0 tag.

adversarygraph.development_status.value: Post-v6.0.0 work on main is Unreleased.
adversarygraph.development_status.scope: Current AdversaryGraph development after the immutable v6.0.0 tag.
adversarygraph.development_status.note: Do not attribute Unified RAG, MCP, the governed Threat Hunting workspace, or other entries under Unreleased to v6.0.0.

value: Governed Threat Hunting workspace and AI assistant
Post-v6 authorization, resilience, and deployment hardening
adversarygraph.unreleased_capabilities.scope: Named capability families present on current main but absent from the v6.0.0 tag.

contributions.accepted_external.scope: External GitHub pull requests authored by anpa1200 with a recorded merged_at timestamp, plus merged GitLab merge requests in the maintained validation inventory.
contributions.accepted_external.note: Breakdown: 8 GitHub pull requests and 0 GitLab merge requests. Closed-unmerged submissions are excluded.

contributions.open_external.scope: Open external submissions awaiting upstream disposition in the maintained GitHub and GitLab validation inventory.
contributions.open_external.note: Breakdown: 30 open GitHub pull requests and 1 open GitLab merge request. These are not accepted contributions.

contributions.closed_unmerged_external.scope: Closed external GitHub pull requests with no recorded merge; tracked separately from accepted and open submissions.

content.medium_exported_articles.scope: Unique local article pages preserved under docs/articles in the medium-blog-navigation source repository and deployed under /articles/read/; this is an archive count, not a claim about the current Medium publication total.

content.local_companion_articles.scope: Authored standalone HTML companion articles directly under /articles/ in the main-site repository, excluding the directory index and the generated article archive under /articles/read/.

content.field_guides.scope: Maintained Docusaurus field-guide sites listed in seo/remote-sitemaps.json, excluding AdversaryGraph product documentation and the Medium export archive.

content.field_guide_names.scope: The eight maintained field guides counted by content.field_guides.

content.product_documentation_sites.scope: Maintained product-documentation site excluded from the field-guide total: AdversaryGraph Documentation.

content.threat_matrix_technique_pages.scope: Generated ATT&CK technique and sub-technique entity pages under /threat-matrix/techniques/.

content.threat_matrix_actor_pages.scope: Generated ATT&CK group entity pages under /threat-matrix/actors/.

content.threat_matrix_entity_pages.scope: Sum of generated Threat Matrix technique/sub-technique and actor entity pages.

value.name: Threat Matrix
value.relationship: Public, read-only browser ATT&CK workspace associated with AdversaryGraph; it is not the full self-hosted platform.

products.public_attack_workspace.scope: Approved current name and boundary for the public ATT&CK workspace.

products.threatmapper.scope: Historical product name retained in version-specific articles and compatibility redirects only.

products.portfolio_registry.scope: Central lifecycle registry for the named platform/workspace and GitHub repositories explicitly marked archived by GitHub. Unlisted repositories are not assigned a lifecycle status by this fact.

products.experimental_registry.scope: Products explicitly declared experimental in the central portfolio registry. An empty list means no current product is assigned that lifecycle state; it does not relabel labs or research demonstrations as products.

contact.public_phone.scope: Whether any public HTML or public PDF published by this repository may contain a private phone number.
contact.public_phone.note: Public contact is limited to the site email link and listed professional profiles.
